title: Decompose Plan Query Registration
summary: Split the plan query parser registration surface into smaller modules with clearer ownership boundaries.
scope_items: Extract the oversized plan query parser registration into smaller registration modules.
Keep parser behavior and command docs coherent while reducing one plan-owned hotspot.
done_when_items: The plan query registration surface is split across smaller focused modules without behavior drift.
Targeted typing, lint, and command smoke checks pass for the refactored parser surface.
